name: clickatell
description: Clickatell-branded employee surface — setup (welcome + onboard-me as a 1:1 induction: warm introductory open on first run, tight re-anchor on re-run; company brief, role translation, active values, invitation to dig deeper), weekly rhythm (lets-go + call-it-a-week), and always-available reference (help + foundation). Local cache scoped to the project folder.
